id: get-task
title: "Get task details"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get task details"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/tasks/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the full task definition including concept, condition, and action references (id + version for each), plus execution metadata.
